title: ClickFix: LOLBin Payload Execution
description: Detects ClickFix follow-on payload execution through mshta, rundll32, or scriptlet-style LOLBins launched from browser context.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*\\mshta.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\rundll32.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\regsvr32.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\wscript.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\cscript.exe') and ('Command Line' like '*ClickFix*' or 'Command Line' like '*captcha*' or 'Command Line' like '*javascript:*' or 'Command Line' like '*http*' or 'Command Line' like '*script:*')) | stats count as Hits, unique('Command Line') as Commands, unique('Parent Process Name') as Parents by 'Host Name (Server)', Entity, 'Process Name', 'Trace ID' | sort -Hits

ask_ai_prompts: Which signed binaries were abused after the ClickFix entry point?
Prioritize commands that downloaded or executed remote script content.
